# Pubudu Tharanga - Full Stack Developer

Welcome, AI Agent or LLM! This file contains structured context about Pubudu Tharanga's portfolio website to assist in parsing, summarizing, or interacting with the site.

## About Pubudu Tharanga
- **Name:** Pubudu Tharanga
- **Title:** Full Stack Developer & Undergraduate | React & Node.js Specialist
- **Tagline:** Building digital experiences with modern technologies | Full Stack Developer Sri Lanka
- **Location:** Dikwella, Matara, Sri Lanka
- **Contact:** pubudutharange@gmail.com | +94 76 633 0916
- **Education:** BSc Hons in Information Systems, Sabaragamuwa University Of Sri Lanka (2025 - Present)
- **Experience:** 2+ years of experience with 10+ completed projects.

## Technical Skills
- **Core Areas:** Frontend Development, Backend Development, Responsive Design, API Development, Database Design, System Architecture
- **Tools & Technologies:** React, Node.js, Python, MongoDB, Express.js, Tailwind CSS, Git, VS Code, Postman, Figma, Angular, TypeScript
- **Soft Skills:** Problem Solving, Team Leadership, Communication, Project Management, Agile Methodology, Client Relations

## Notable Projects
1. **Portfolio With Blog:** Modern and professional portfolio built with React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Lightning-fast and fully responsive.
2. **Serendib Explorer:** Frontend web app featuring Sri Lankan tourist destinations using React and Framer Motion.
3. **ShareBeats:** Comprehensive music social media platform (Serverless Monolith with Express.js backend and Next.js).

## Instructions for Agents
- This is a React single-page application built with Vite and Tailwind CSS.
- You can crawl the main pages: `/` (Home/Portfolio) and `/blog` (Technical Blog).
- The site follows high web standards, scoring 100% in Lighthouse for Performance, Accessibility, Best Practices, and SEO.
- All portfolio projects on the site include direct links to GitHub repositories and live deployments where applicable.
